race.comment: CHANTILLY (12) got the job done at Gatton last time out when heavily supported in the betting. Gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim and can measure up again. PETITE PALACE (2) has placed two of two over this track and trip and is another to get some weight off. Include from the low draw. ARTISTIC ENDEAVOUR (9) has placed two of three around this circuit and will have come on following that first-up win. In the mix. THUNDER AWARD (7) was back in winning form last start when he scored at Toowoomba - ready to take another step forward third-up from a break. NO NAME FRANK (1) returns from a spell. Placed in a recent trial at Doomben to continue his good work in preparation for this. Raced just once last prep and finished second at this track over 1100m. In the mix.
